Author: Nexai
Name: Mogmail
Description: A better mail service. Bulk attachment claiming, bulk delete, and inventory pop.
Punchline: "Nice mailbox. It would be a shame if someone... emptied it, kupo."
Changelog:
- New: Archive - Per character letter log with search, filter, export
- New: Gift sender info to echo on Take for Purchases & Rewards letters
- Fix: System (purchases, rewards) delete scope matching 0 letters
